title: Acute Brain Slices
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3vj3j","text":"This protocol describes the steps for preparing acute brain slices.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9nn01","text":"Prepare stock solutions: 10X Stock solutions can be made ahead of time and are shelf stable at   for 1 month; 1X solutions must be made fresh","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":95,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"50gc3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e1nph","text":"10X ACSF","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bum8r","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bj6vh","text":"10X Cutting Solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3unb7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"9CF4DD7057D011ECAECC3DE0D09831B4","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"","unit":32}}}}
steps: Set up vibratome and cutting station:

Set up vibratome Carefully clean blade with ethanol and water Using a hex wrench, insert blade in blade holder assembly Run VibroCheck calibration Place buffer tray in ice tray and fill ice tray with ice; load on to vibratome Superglue a rectangular piece (~2 cm x 1 cm x 1 cm) of 3% agar onto the specimen plate

Make 1X ACSF: Prepare 1 L per mouse. 900 mL, MilliQH2O + 100 mL, stock 10X ACSF + 1.8 g, NaHCO3 + 2 g, glucose Keep in water bath 32 °C and bubble continuously with 95% O 2 / 5% CO 2 . Add ~30 mL to a slice holding vial, keep at 32 °C and bubble continuously with 95% O 2 / 5% CO 2 .

Make 1X cutting solution: Prepare 250 mL per mouse 225 mL, MilliQH2O + 25 mL, stock 10X cutting solution + 0.5 mg, NaHCO3 + 0.125 g, glucose + 4.3 g, sucrose Chill on ice and bubble with 95% O 2 / 5% CO 2 .
Set up perfusion and cutting tools
Perfuse animal with cold cutting solution
Dissect brain and glue it to specimen plate.
Insert plate in buffer tray and fill tray with 1X cutting solution.
Lower blade into solution, set front and back limits and settings. Slice at 0.8 mm/s 240 µm, slices
Collect relevant slices as they come off the blade, and carefully transfer to warmed slice vial.
Recover slices at 32 °C and bubbled for at least 45 minutes.
creator: Kelsey Barcomb
